Name: MOD-Navigation-SideNav-Functional: Verify 'Home' link navigates to the Home page and displays the 'Home' h1 heading
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials. Application is accessible at [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL].
Objective: To verify clicking 'Home' in the new-style side navigation navigates to /home-new and the 'Home' h1 heading is displayed in the main content area.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed with 'Email' and 'Password' input fields.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the BoardEffect Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate directly to the UI-Workroom workroom page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Workroom page is displayed at /workrooms/5732 with h1 heading 'UI-Workroom'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Side navigation' button to open the side navigation drawer
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Home' link in the side navigation
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to the Home page. URL changes to /home-new. Page title is 'Welcome to BoardEffect'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the 'Home' heading (h1) is displayed in the main content area
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=heading level=1 name="Home" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Home' h1 heading is visible in the main content area confirming successful navigation to the new-style Home.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Side navigation' button to reopen the side navigation drawer
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Home' link is visible in the side navigation
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Home' link is present in the side navigation.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Open profile menu" | value: none
locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.
